senses.gloss: The fifteenth letter of the Arabic alphabet, written in the Arabic script; preceded by ص (ṣ) and followed by ط (ṭ).
The twenty-sixth numeral symbol of the Arabic alphabet (traditional abjad order, used for list numbering), written in the Arabic script; preceded by ذ (ḏ) and followed by ظ (ẓ).

etymology.text: Derived from ص (ṣ), and originally written as such (in rasm) by analogy with Nabatean tradition, as Nabatean cognates of Arabic words with /dˤ/ were indiscriminately spelled using 𐢙 (ṣ).
